mapper.sql: id, depCode, depName, depAbbr, compID, adminID, depGrade, depType, depProperty, depCost, director, director2, depEmp, depNum, state, effectiveForm, effectiveTo, disabledTime, remark, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, depCustom1, depCustom2, depCustom3, depCustom4, depCustom5
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into t_department (depCode, depName, depAbbr, compID, adminID, depGrade, depType, depProperty, depCost, director, director2, depEmp, depNum, state, effectiveForm, effectiveTo, disabledTime, remark, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, depCustom1, depCustom2, depCustom3, depCustom4, depCustom5 ) values (#{depCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depProperty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depCost,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{director,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{director2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depEmp,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{state,jdbcType=BIT}, #{effectiveForm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{disabledTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{depCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depCustom3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depCustom4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depCustom5,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

depCode,
depName,

mapper.update:
update t_department
depCode = #{depCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
depName = #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
depAbbr = #{depAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
compID = #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
adminID = #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depGrade = #{depGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depType = #{depType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depProperty = #{depProperty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depCost = #{depCost,jdbcType=INTEGER},
director = #{director,jdbcType=INTEGER},
director2 = #{director2,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depEmp = #{depEmp,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depNum = #{depNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
state = #{state,jdbcType=BIT},
effectiveForm = #{effectiveForm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
disabledTime = #{disabledTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
depCustom1 = #{depCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depCustom2 = #{depCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depCustom3 = #{depCustom3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
depCustom4 = #{depCustom4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
depCustom5 = #{depCustom5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_department set depCode = #{depCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, depName = #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, depAbbr = #{depAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, compID = #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, adminID = #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depGrade = #{depGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depType = #{depType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depProperty = #{depProperty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depCost = #{depCost,jdbcType=INTEGER}, director = #{director,jdbcType=INTEGER}, director2 = #{director2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depEmp = #{depEmp,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depNum = #{depNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, state = #{state,jdbcType=BIT}, effectiveForm = #{effectiveForm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, disabledTime = #{disabledTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, depCustom1 = #{depCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depCustom2 = #{depCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depCustom3 = #{depCustom3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, depCustom4 = #{depCustom4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, depCustom5 = #{depCustom5,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from t_department
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCode = #{depCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depName = #{depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depAbbr = #{depAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

depNum = #{depNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

effectiveForm = #{effectiveForm, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
disabledTime = #{disabledTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

depCustom2 = #{depCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom3 = #{depCustom3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depCustom4 = #{depCustom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depCustom5 = #{depCustom5, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

select count(1) from t_department
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCode = #{depCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depName = #{depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depAbbr = #{depAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

director2 = #{director2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depEmp = #{depEmp, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

depCustom2 = #{depCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

depCustom4 = #{depCustom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depCustom5 = #{depCustom5, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

select * from t_department
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCode = #{model.depCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depName = #{model.depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depAbbr = #{model.depAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
adminID = #{model.adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depGrade = #{model.depGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depType = #{model.depType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depProperty = #{model.depProperty, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCost = #{model.depCost, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
director = #{model.director, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
director2 = #{model.director2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depEmp = #{model.depEmp, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depNum = #{model.depNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
effectiveForm = #{model.effectiveForm, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
disabledTime = #{model.disabledTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
depCustom1 = #{model.depCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom2 = #{model.depCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom3 = #{model.depCustom3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depCustom4 = #{model.depCustom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depCustom5 = #{model.depCustom5, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
( depCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depAbbr like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depCustom3 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depCustom4 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depCustom5 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from t_department
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCode = #{model.depCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depName = #{model.depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depAbbr = #{model.depAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
adminID = #{model.adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depGrade = #{model.depGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depType = #{model.depType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depProperty = #{model.depProperty, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCost = #{model.depCost, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
director = #{model.director, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
director2 = #{model.director2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depEmp = #{model.depEmp, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depNum = #{model.depNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
effectiveForm = #{model.effectiveForm, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
disabledTime = #{model.disabledTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
depCustom1 = #{model.depCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom2 = #{model.depCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom3 = #{model.depCustom3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depCustom4 = #{model.depCustom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depCustom5 = #{model.depCustom5, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
( depCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depAbbr like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depCustom3 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depCustom4 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depCustom5 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
